name: The One
short_description: The One is a game in which your goal will be to explore the world alone or in a group three years after the zombie apocalypse. However, the problem will turn out to be not only zombies, but also others who managed to survive this time behind the gates of the bunkers.
detailed_description:
The One – A post-apocalyptic survival game created by two independent developers.

The world has fallen into chaos. Society has collapsed, and the undead roam freely. In The One, your mission is simple: survive. Gather resources, build shelter, fight off zombies, and interact with other survivors open world. Are you ready to face the challenge?

🛠️ KEY FEATURES

🔹 Survive in a Hostile World – Scavenge for food, water, and essential supplies, or cultivate your own resources to endure the harsh post-apocalyptic environment.

🔹 Explore a Vast Open World – Search abandoned buildings, forests, and ruins for valuable materials and hidden secrets. Every corner of the world holds opportunities – and dangers.

🔹 Gather and Craft – Chop down trees, mine raw materials, and craft essential tools, weapons, and equipment that will increase your chances of survival.

🔹 Build and Fortify Your Shelter – Construct and upgrade your base to withstand zombie attacks and provide a safe haven for yourself and your allies.

🔹 Engage in Intense Combat – Battle zombies, dangerous wildlife, and rival survivors using a variety of weapons. Every fight is a test of skill and strategy.

🔹 Weapon Customization – Modify and upgrade your weapons to maximize their effectiveness in combat. A well-prepared survivor is a living survivor.

🔹 Dynamic Missions and Rewards – Take on challenging tasks to earn valuable resources, blueprints, and rewards that will aid your journey.

🔹 Trade and Cooperate – Interact with other survivors to trade goods, form alliances, or face off against hostile factions.

🌿 EARLY ACCESS – JOIN THE JOURNEY! The One is an evolving experience, and we need your feedback! Join us in Early Access and help shape the game’s future with your ideas and support.

The apocalypse is here. Will you conquer it, or will you become another lost soul in the wasteland?

🔗 Add to your wishlist now and prepare for the fight of your life!
